MARKET WRAP — Mar 23, 2026

Markets retreated into defensive positioning as stagflation concerns intensified, with the VIX climbing to 26.15 while bonds failed to provide refuge despite falling yields
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Mar 23, 2026 Markets retreated into defensive positioning as stagflation concerns intensified, with the VIX climbing to 26.15 while bonds failed to provide refuge despite falling yields. The broad risk-off sentiment weighed on both equities and crypto, as investors grappled with persistent inflation alongside slowing growth dynamics.
